_doc: Canonical HME telemetry event registry. Edit this file, then run tools/HME/activity/render_events_doc.py to refresh EVENTS.md.

events.name: file_written
events.summary: A watcher or proxy detected a write under an allow-listed path.

events.name: file_watcher_filtered
events.summary: A watcher write was suppressed by ignore directories, extensions, or noise suffixes.

events.name: brief_recorded
events.summary: Read/Edit enrichment recorded a target brief before editing it.

events.name: auto_brief_injected
events.summary: A pretooluse hook chained the KB briefing automatically.

events.name: edit_without_brief
events.summary: A src/ Edit fired without a prior brief.

events.name: kb_draft_written
events.summary: posttooluse_bash auto-wrote tmp/hme-learn-draft.json after a stable pipeline verdict.

events.name: productive_incoherence
events.summary: An edit intentionally entered uncovered territory while preserving traceability.

events.name: learn_suggested
events.summary: A hook suggested capturing novel findings into HME knowledge.

events.name: read_context
events.summary: Read context middleware enriched a Read result with KB titles.

events.name: memory_redirect_flagged_preemptive
events.summary: Memory redirect middleware caught a deprecated memory-path write before hook handling.

events.name: bash_error_surfaced
events.summary: Bash enrichment extracted an error snippet from a bash tool result.

events.name: bg_dominance_resolved
events.summary: Background dominance resolved a backgrounded i/* stub into real output.

events.name: bg_dominance_timeout
events.summary: Backgrounded resolution exceeded its wait window.

events.name: dominance_prefetch_fired
events.summary: Dominance prefetch warmed cache for a likely-next call.

events.name: web_tool_call
events.summary: The agent invoked a WebSearch or WebFetch tool.

events.name: mcp_tool_call
events.summary: The agent invoked an MCP tool.

events.name: tool_call
events.summary: Generic proxy bookkeeping marker for a completed tool invocation.

events.name: hme_tool_result
events.summary: The proxy received a result for an HME tool call.

events.name: hme_continuation
events.summary: The proxy emitted a continuation step on a multi-step HME tool flow.

events.name: hme_continuation_complete
events.summary: A multi-step HME continuation completed.

events.name: enricher_acted_upon
events.summary: A downstream tool call referenced an identifier injected by an enricher.

events.name: enricher_fired
events.summary: An enricher middleware appended content to a tool result.

events.name: empty_tool_result_marked
events.summary: The proxy tagged an empty tool result body as SUCCESS or FAIL.

events.name: status_inject
events.summary: i/status output was auto-injected as a system reminder.

events.name: jurisdiction_inject
events.summary: The proxy injected a hypermeta jurisdiction warning into agent context.

events.name: neighborhood_enrichment
events.summary: Grep/glob neighborhood middleware appended sibling-file context.

events.name: semantic_redundancy_stripped
events.summary: The proxy removed redundant sentences from a tool result before display.

events.name: boilerplate_stripped
events.summary: The proxy removed boilerplate prefixes from tool output.

events.name: secret_sanitized
events.summary: Secret sanitizer middleware redacted credential patterns from tool output.

events.name: skill_reminder_stripped
events.summary: The proxy removed repeated skill reminders or compacted low-signal Stop-hook feedback.

events.name: memory_redirect
events.summary: Middleware redirected a memory-directory write attempt.

events.name: nexus_cleared
events.summary: The NEXUS state file was reset, typically at session start.

events.name: dir_context
events.summary: Directory-context middleware injected directory-intent context.

events.name: edit_context
events.summary: Edit-context middleware injected pre-edit KB context.

events.name: cache_control_normalized
events.summary: The proxy promoted short cache_control TTLs to avoid upstream ordering failures.

events.name: inference_call
events.summary: A local-inference subprocess was invoked.

events.name: upstream_error
events.summary: The proxy classified an upstream HTTP or SSE response as failed.

events.name: upstream_conn_error
events.summary: A TCP/TLS-level failure occurred before an upstream HTTP response.

events.name: upstream_midresponse_error
events.summary: The upstream began streaming and then failed or closed prematurely.

events.name: agent_jobs_result_captured
events.summary: Agent-job capture wrote a non-empty Agent result for a queued HME task.

events.name: agent_jobs_empty_result
events.summary: Agent-job capture wrote an empty Agent result for a queued HME task.

events.name: subagent_clean_gate_ok
events.summary: The subagent clean gate passed its advisory checks for files mentioned by an Agent result.

events.name: subagent_clean_gate_failed
events.summary: The subagent clean gate found advisory check failures for files mentioned by an Agent result.

events.name: adhoc_spawn
events.summary: The supervisor spawned an ad-hoc child process.

events.name: child_started
events.summary: A supervised child process started successfully.

events.name: child_adopted
events.summary: The supervisor adopted an existing child PID after restart or discovery.

events.name: child_exited
events.summary: A supervised child exited cleanly.

events.name: child_unhealthy
events.summary: A child failed health check and restart handling is pending.

events.name: child_hang_killed
events.summary: A child was killed for hanging past its timeout.

events.name: child_force_killed
events.summary: A child required SIGKILL after SIGTERM did not resolve it.

events.name: child_restarted
events.summary: The supervisor restarted a failed child.

events.name: child_restart_limit
events.summary: A child exceeded restart attempts and the supervisor stopped trying.

events.name: mcp_hang_kill
events.summary: An MCP server was killed for hanging.

events.name: supervisor_spawn_error
events.summary: The supervisor failed to spawn a child process.

events.name: proxy_emergency
events.summary: The proxy entered an emergency state requiring backoff or intervention.

events.name: proxy_emergency_cleared
events.summary: The emergency valve auto-cleared after the backoff window elapsed.

events.name: cascade_prediction_empty
events.summary: A cascade-prediction call returned no candidates.

events.name: cascade_prediction_injected
events.summary: Cascade prediction middleware injected a prediction snippet.

events.name: coherence_violation
events.summary: A read/edit or autocommit pattern matched a known-incoherent shape.

events.name: hci_regression
events.summary: HCI score dropped by the configured regression threshold round-over-round.

events.name: consensus_divergence
events.summary: Two synthesis paths disagreed beyond the configured threshold.

events.name: consensus_regression
events.summary: Consensus score dropped round-over-round.

events.name: legendary_drift_preemptive
events.summary: The drift detector caught a known-bad pattern before it landed.

events.name: harvester_ignored
events.summary: The KB harvester rejected a candidate entry.

events.name: axis_rebalance_cost
events.summary: The coherence axis rebalancer applied a cost adjustment.

events.name: axis_share_deviation
events.summary: A coherence axis share moved outside the target band.

events.name: epoch_transition_auto_applied
events.summary: The pipeline auto-applied an epoch transition.

events.name: review_complete
events.summary: i/review completed and captured a verdict.

events.name: pipeline_start
events.summary: A pipeline run started.

events.name: pipeline_baseline_delta
events.summary: The pipeline recorded commit/file delta versus the previous run.

events.name: pipeline_run
events.summary: A pipeline run finished and recorded verdict, pass/fail, wall time, and HCI.

events.name: round_complete
events.summary: A pipeline round finished and closed the activity window for coherence calculations.

events.name: idle_round
events.summary: A coherence-score window contained no human or agent file-written activity.

events.name: pipeline_finished
events.summary: The posttooluse Bash hook observed pipeline completion.

events.name: session_start
events.summary: The session-start lifecycle hook initialized a new session boundary.

events.name: turn_start
events.summary: The UserPromptSubmit lifecycle hook marked the start of a chat turn.

events.name: turn_complete
events.summary: The Stop lifecycle hook marked the end of a chat turn.
